AttachEniInstance.eniId: ID of the elastic network interface
AttachEniInstance.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string up to 64 characters; see [ClientToken Idempotency](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性)
AttachEniInstance.instanceId: ID of the bound cloud product instance
AttachEniInstance.instanceType: Type of the bound cloud product instance; valid values: server/hpas (cloud server/HPAS respectively); default is server
